models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Manage your AI providers and monitor token usage.

recentTokenHistory.title: Recent Token Usage
recentTokenHistory.description: Recent assistant responses and tool results with model/provider usage data.
recentTokenHistory.emptyForWindow: No token usage history in this time range

imageGeneration.title: Image Generation
imageGeneration.description: Configure one custom OpenAI Images-compatible endpoint for the image_generate tool. It is independent from chat providers.
imageGeneration.agentAuthDesc: Image generation uses the API key saved for this custom image endpoint in each agent's auth-profiles.json.
imageGeneration.clearConfirmMessage: This removes the custom image endpoint, model selection, and stored API key. Chat providers are not affected.
imageGeneration.testPrompt: A small red circle on a white background, minimal flat illustration.

toast.saveBeforeTest: Save settings before running a test

openAiRelay.title: Custom image endpoint
openAiRelay.description: Send image generation to a dedicated OpenAI Images-compatible endpoint (/v1/images/generations). This does not change any chat provider.
openAiRelay.baseUrlHint: e.g. https://api.example.com/v1 — /v1 is appended automatically when omitted.
openAiRelay.apiKeyPlaceholderConfigured: Already configured — leave blank to keep
openAiRelay.modelHint: Enter only the model id, for example gpt-image-2. Do not include provider/model.

errors.invalidTimeout: Timeout must be a positive number
errors.relayModelInvalid: Enter only the model name, for example gpt-image-2. Do not include provider/model.
